case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS MOGAVERO, CARLO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,791.80 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MOGAVERO, CARLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-12-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
